orgs.description: Per-organization configuration, keyed by GitHub owner (org or user).

AiConfig.description: Settings under the `ai` key (used in both org and repo scopes).

reviewers.description:
Default reviewers for `a ai review wait` and `a ai review request`.
`None` means "fall back to the next layer" (org -> built-in default).

AutoCompactConfig.description:
Configuration for automatically running `/compact` against sessions that
have been idle for `idle_timeout` while the prompt cache is still warm.

The Stop hook spawns a detached `a cc auto-compact schedule` process for
each Stop event. After `idle_timeout` of inactivity (anchored on the Stop
hook fire time), it SIGTERMs the live `claude` process and then re-runs
`claude -r <id> -p "/compact"` so that the compaction itself benefits from
the still-warm prompt cache.

enabled.description: Whether automatic compaction is enabled (default: true).

idle_timeout.description:
How long a session must stay idle (since the last Stop hook) before
auto-compact fires. Should be slightly less than the prompt cache TTL
so the resulting `/compact` invocation hits a warm cache (Claude Code
subscriptions: 5m TTL → default 4m30s).

min_context_tokens.description:
Minimum context size (in tokens) required before auto-compact fires.
Sessions whose latest assistant turn shows a smaller prompt than this
are skipped — compacting a tiny context wastes a turn and discards
useful state for no benefit. Measured against
`input + cache_read + cache_creation + output` of the most recent
assistant entry in the transcript, so it tracks the actual prompt the
next turn would send regardless of which model context window is in
use (200k vs 1M).
Default: 180000.

AutoPauseConfig.description:
Configuration for automatically pausing sessions that stay in the Stopped
state for longer than `timeout`.

A periodic `a cc sweep` run (typically driven by launchd) scans all sessions,
sends SIGTERM to any Claude Code process whose session has been Stopped for
longer than `timeout`, and flips the session status to Paused so that
`a cc resume` can restore it later.

enabled.description: Whether automatic pausing is enabled (default: true).

timeout.description:
How long a session must stay in Stopped before being paused.
Accepts human-friendly durations parsed by the `humantime` style parser
built into armyknife, e.g., "30s", "10m", "1h30m".
Default: "30m".

auto_compact.description:
Automatic `/compact` settings for idle sessions while the prompt cache
is still warm.

auto_pause.description: Automatic pause settings for long-stopped sessions.

focus_app.description:
App name to focus on notification click (macOS only).
If omitted, derived from the terminal setting.

LayoutNode.description: Layout tree node: either a single pane (leaf) or a split (internal node).

sound.description: Notification sound name (default: "Glass"). Empty string for silent.

ai.description: AI-related per-org defaults (e.g., reviewer set for `a ai review wait`).

PaneConfig.description: Configuration for a single tmux pane.

command.description: Command to run in the pane.

focus.description: Whether to focus this pane (default: false).

ai.description: AI-related per-repo overrides (e.g., reviewer set for `a ai review wait`).

direct_commit.description:
Whether direct commits to the default branch (e.g., master/main) are allowed.
Consumed by external git hooks; armyknife only stores and exposes the value.

language.description: Language for commit messages and PR content (e.g., "ja", "en").

SplitConfig.description: Split configuration with direction and two child nodes.

first.description: First child (left for horizontal, top for vertical).

second.description: Second child (right for horizontal, bottom for vertical).

Terminal.description: Terminal emulator to use for human-in-the-loop reviews.

repos_root.description:
Root directory containing git repositories.
Used by `wm clean --all` to discover repositories.
Falls back to GHQ_ROOT env, git config ghq.root, or ~/ghq.
